title: Full eval + readability + a11y verification + comprehension instrument + adoption runbook
context: With all M3 content (incidence-explorers-literacy-012, incidence-explorers-explainer-013, incidence-explorers-helplines-014) and the eval harness (incidence-explorers-eval-011) complete, the project needs a comprehensive readiness verification pass before beneficiary handoff. This task assembles the final quality evidence, the comprehension-measurement instrument, and the adoption runbook that will allow a beneficiary organisation to onboard and use the explainers. No partner is yet secured.
objective: Conduct a full readiness verification: (1) run all eval gates (provenance, caveat, suppression, content-safety, helpline verification, readability, a11y) and confirm green; (2) verify plain-language readability target met across all content; (3) confirm WCAG 2.2 AA on all dashboards/explainers via automated scan + manual AT testing; (4) co-design (or draft for co-design with the future partner) a credible before/after comprehension instrument that collects no privacy-sensitive end-user data; (5) write an adoption/onboarding runbook for a beneficiary organisation.
acceptanceCriteria: All eval gates are green: provenance coverage 100%, caveat coverage 100%, suppression safety 0 violations, content-safety lint 0 violations, helpline verification 100%, plain-language readability target met, WCAG 2.2 AA verified

A credible before/after comprehension instrument is drafted (co-designed or ready for co-design with the partner): it measures whether a reader interprets a sample statistic more correctly after using an explainer, and collects no privacy-sensitive end-user data
An adoption/onboarding runbook for a beneficiary organisation is written: covers what the partner needs to embed/use an explainer with their community
Plain-language review is passed across all user-facing content
Manual assistive-technology testing is completed and results recorded; WCAG 2.2 AA confirmed
Reviewed and signed off by the Maintainer, Statistics reviewer, and Expert (oncologist + patient advocate) (recorded)
output: A merged PR containing the readiness verification report (all gates green), the comprehension instrument, and the adoption runbook — proof that the project is ready for a real beneficiary partner and the Definition of Shipped in M5.
